searchPlaceholder: Search names, services, or phone numbers
privacy: Privacy note: checklist and plan entries stay in this browser only unless you export or share them yourself.
heroDescription: Knowing your neighbors can save your life. Build a household kit, organize a neighborhood plan, and keep emergency response steps ready on your phone.
planDescription: Record the plan details your neighborhood agrees to. Data stays on this device.
quickDescription: For widespread emergencies when first responders are unable to reach the neighborhood right away.
rolesDescription: Name volunteers and backup volunteers before an emergency.
hazardsDescription: Use this as a planning prompt. Your neighborhood should identify likely hazards and decide what needs would follow.
installIos: On iPhone: tap Share, then Add to Home Screen.
sourceDisclaimer: Emergency instructions should be verified by local emergency management before public deployment.
